description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build-and-test that runs on push to devel and master branches, on pull requests to devel, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has multiple jobs: build-ubuntu, build-mac, cppcheck, valgrind, codecov, and ceres. The build-ubuntu job builds and tests on multiple Ubuntu environments with different compilers. The build-mac job builds and tests on macOS. The cppcheck, valgrind, codecov, and ceres jobs run static analysis, memory checks, code coverage, and tests respectively, dependent on build-ubuntu.
